# JSValueIsBigInt(_:_:) | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ JavaScriptCore ](/documentation/javascriptcore)

- [ JSValueIsBigInt(_:_:) ](/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValueIsBigInt(_:_:))

-  JSValueIsBigInt(_:_:) 

Function# JSValueIsBigInt(_:_:)

iOS 18.0+iPadOS 18.0+Mac Catalyst 18.0+macOS 15.0+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 2.0+

```
func JSValueIsBigInt(
    _ ctx: JSContextRef,
    _ value: JSValueRef
) -> Bool
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValueIsBigInt(_:_:)#parameters)

`ctx`The execution context to use.

`value`The JSValue to test.

## [Return Value](/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValueIsBigInt(_:_:)#return-value)

True if value’s type is the BigInt type, otherwise false.

## [Discussion](/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValueIsBigInt(_:_:)#discussion)

Tests whether a JavaScript value’s type is the BigInt type.
